properties.name: jsonrpc.enabled
properties.description: Enable JSON-RPC web endpoint auto-configuration.

properties.name: jsonrpc.path
properties.description: HTTP endpoint path for JSON-RPC requests. Must start with '/'.

properties.name: jsonrpc.max-batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of calls allowed in a batch request. Must be greater than 0.

properties.name: jsonrpc.max-request-bytes
properties.description: Maximum accepted raw request payload size in bytes. Must be greater than 0.

properties.name: jsonrpc.scan-annotated-methods
properties.description: Scan beans for @JsonRpcMethod and register discovered handlers.

properties.name: jsonrpc.include-error-data
properties.description: Include JsonRpcException data payload in error responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.metrics-enabled
properties.description: Enable Micrometer metrics interceptor when MeterRegistry is present.

properties.name: jsonrpc.metrics-latency-histogram-enabled
properties.description: Enable percentile histogram publication for JSON-RPC latency-related metrics.

properties.name: jsonrpc.metrics-latency-percentiles
properties.description: Optional latency percentiles to publish (each value must be between 0.0 and 1.0, exclusive).

properties.name: jsonrpc.metrics-max-method-tag-values
properties.description: Maximum unique method tag values for metrics. Additional methods are grouped under 'other'.

properties.name: jsonrpc.notification-executor-enabled
properties.description: Dispatch notifications through a Spring Executor bean when available.

properties.name: jsonrpc.notification-executor-bean-name
properties.description: Executor bean name for notification dispatch when multiple Executor beans are present.

properties.name: jsonrpc.method-registration-conflict-policy
properties.description: Policy used when a method name is registered more than once.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.require-json-rpc-version-20
properties.description: Require incoming request jsonrpc to equal "2.0".

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.require-id-member
properties.description: Require incoming requests to include an id member.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.allow-null-id
properties.description: Allow id:null in incoming requests.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.allow-string-id
properties.description: Allow string ids in incoming requests.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.allow-numeric-id
properties.description: Allow numeric ids in incoming requests.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.allow-fractional-id
properties.description: Allow fractional numeric ids in incoming requests.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.reject-response-fields
properties.description: Reject request objects containing response-only fields (result/error).

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.reject-duplicate-members
properties.description: Reject duplicate members when parsing raw JSON request payloads.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.request.params-type-violation-code-policy
properties.description: Error-code policy when request params is present but neither object nor array.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-json-rpc-version-20
properties.description: Require incoming response jsonrpc to equal "2.0".

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-id-member
properties.description: Require incoming responses to include an id member.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.allow-null-id
properties.description: Allow id:null in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.allow-string-id
properties.description: Allow string ids in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.allow-numeric-id
properties.description: Allow numeric ids in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.allow-fractional-id
properties.description: Allow fractional numeric ids in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-exclusive-result-or-error
properties.description: Require exactly one of result or error in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-error-object-when-present
properties.description: Require error to be an object when present in incoming responses.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-integer-error-code
properties.description: Require error.code to be an integer when validated.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.require-string-error-message
properties.description: Require error.message to be a string when validated.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.reject-request-fields
properties.description: Reject response objects containing request-only fields (method/params).

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.reject-duplicate-members
properties.description: Reject duplicate members when parsing raw JSON response payloads.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.error-code.policy
properties.description: Accepted integer range policy for incoming response error.code values.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.error-code.range.min
properties.description: Inclusive minimum value for CUSTOM_RANGE error-code policy.

properties.name: jsonrpc.validation.response.error-code.range.max
properties.description: Inclusive maximum value for CUSTOM_RANGE error-code policy.

properties.name: jsonrpc.method-allowlist
properties.description: Allowed JSON-RPC method names. Empty list means allow all. Blank entries are invalid.

properties.name: jsonrpc.method-denylist
properties.description: Denied JSON-RPC method names. Denylist takes precedence over allowlist membership. Blank entries are invalid.
